prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为13694→20193→29931→20060→23042名，整体呈波动后移趋势；2024年曾反弹至20060名，但2025年又回落至23042名，近两年累计后移约2982名，2025年基准约23042名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021–2026年均为24人，连续六年保持不变，计划层面无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局无直接缓冲或加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，军事类院校；软科中国大学排名未进入主榜前200名（军事类院校通常不参与排名），学校层次稳定；该校近年无明显舆情事件，声誉评价平稳；抖音平台热度一般，未进入前100名榜单；投档异常文件中无该校断档或暴跌记录，报考心理层面无明显扰动因素；该校为军队医学院校，临床医学、口腔医学等为传统优势方向，但第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校（军事类院校），无法直接引用学科等级。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学、口腔医学持续高热推荐，护理学推荐，社会报考热度较高；生物技术、生物医学工程属于生化环材大类，社会热度明显劝退。湖南省物理类考生从2025年320192人增至2026年347000人，增幅约8.4%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；省控线2025年本科批405分，较2024年422分有所下降，但；该校位于陕西西安，非湖南省本地院校，无本省招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次23042名、2026年招生计划持平、湖南省物理类考生大幅增加约8.4%以及医学类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年略有加剧，位次小幅后移。预测最低位次约23242名，区间22742–23742名。

- 口腔医学。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间22742–23742名以内，建议以二档临床医学、药学为主攻方向，一档口腔医学（本博连读）和临床医学（本博连读）作为冲刺目标，三档护理学作为保底选择。位次明显优于区间下限（如22000名以内）可重点冲刺一档本博连读专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 13694 → 20193 → 29931 → 20060 → 23042, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall; in 2024, it rebounded to 20060, but in 2025, it fell back to 23042, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2982 positions in the last two years, and the 2025 baseline is approximately 23042; the enrollment plan for this university in Hunan Province for Physics Category from 2021 to 2026 is 24 students each year, remaining unchanged for six consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction at the plan level, and no direct buffering or intensifying effect on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, a military academy; the Soft Science Chinese University Ranking does not place it in the top 200 of the main list (military academies typically do not participate in rankings), and the university level is stable; there have been no significant public opinion incidents in recent years, and the reputation evaluation is stable; the popularity on Douyin platform is average, not entering the top 100 list; there are no records of score drops or crashes for this university in the abnormal filing documents, and there are no obvious disturbing factors at the psychological level of application; this university is a military medical school, with clinical medicine and stomatology as traditional advantageous directions, but the fifth round of discipline evaluation data does not include this university (military academy), so discipline grades cannot be directly cited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine and stomatology continue to be highly recommended, nursing is recommended, and social application popularity is high; biotechnology and biomedical engineering belong to the broad category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with obvious social discouragement. The number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026, an increase of about 8.4%, and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition; the provincial control line for the undergraduate batch in 2025 is 405 points, down from 422 points in 2024, but; this university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, not a local institution in Hunan Province, with no enrollment bias for this province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 23042, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a significant increase of about 8.4% in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province, and the continued high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with a small backward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23242, with a range of 22742 to 23742.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 22742 to 23742, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Clinical Medicine and Pharmacy as main directions, with Tier 1 Stomatology (Bachelor-Doctor Combined Program) and Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Doctor Combined Program) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 Nursing as a safety choice. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 22000), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Bachelor-Doctor Combined Program majors.
